title: ObsIntelligence Scenario
description: AIOps scenario YAML definition for the obs-intelligence scenario correlator.

scenario_id.description: Unique snake_case identifier for this scenario (e.g. cpu_saturation).

display_name.description: Human-readable name shown in tickets and dashboards.

domain.description: Which agent domain owns this scenario.

alert_name_patterns.description: fnmatch patterns for the Alertmanager alert name. If non-empty, the alert name must match at least one pattern or the scenario is skipped entirely.

alert_match_weight.description: Base confidence weight added when alert_name_patterns matches. Allows alert-driven scenarios to fire even before metric data is populated.

confidence_threshold.description: Minimum confidence score (0, 1] required to include this scenario in match results. Default: 0.3.

action.description: Recommended remediation action identifier (e.g. osd_reweight, cpu_scale_out, escalate).

autonomy.description: Who may authorise execution: autonomous (no approval), approval_gated (human sign-off required), human_only (never automate).

irreversible.description: Set true if the recommended action cannot be easily undone. Prevents automated execution.

rca.description: Plain-English root-cause analysis text inserted into the incident ticket body.

playbook_hint.description: Shell/CLI commands used to build the Ansible stub playbook for this scenario.

conditions.description: List of ObsFeatures field checks. Each matched condition adds its weight to the confidence score.

field.description: ObsFeatures dataclass field name to evaluate (e.g. cpu_utilization, degraded_pgs).

operator.description: Comparison operator: gt/lt/gte/lte/eq/ne for numeric fields; true/false for booleans.

threshold.description: Numeric value to compare the field against. Ignored for 'true'/'false' operators. Default: 0.0.

weight.description: Contribution to the confidence score when this condition is satisfied. Must be > 0.
